'''Tan Shilley''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Morganian]], and the proprietor of [[Shilley's]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Questal/Legends|Questal]]. Intelligent and cautious, she was not in the habit of endangering herself to assist others. She possessed the keen bright [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and the pale skin typical of her [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]'' {{Reprint|The Game Chambers of Questal}} {{1st}}
